data.title: Trump's visit to China to address $1 trillion trade surplus, aiming for economic self-reliance and balance in relationship.
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent confirmed that President Trump's upcoming visit to Beijing in April will focus on addressing China's $1 trillion trade surplus which Bessent referred to as "impossible." The meeting aims to pivot the U.S. towards industrial independence and address the lopsided trade relationship between the two nations. Bessent stated that the world cannot sustain China's persistent trade surplus, emphasizing the need to rebalance the relationship. The upcoming summit is expected to be the first of up to four bilateral meetings in 2026. This visit signifies a shift towards aggressive economic self-reliance and aims to address the imbalance created by the current trade flows.

data.title: CEMENTOS PACASMAYO S.A.A. Annual Shareholders' Meeting on March 24, 2026, 9:00 a.m. in Lima, Peru at Calle la Colonia No. 150.
data.description: A notice has been issued for the Annual Mandatory Shareholders' Meeting of CEMENTOS PACASMAYO S.A.A. scheduled to take place on March 24, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. The meeting will be held at the corporate Company's registered office in Lima, Peru, located at Calle la Colonia No. 150, Urb. El Vivero, Surco. In accordance with the Company's bylaws and the General Corporations Law, shareholders are required to attend, and if necessary, a second call will be held on March 31, 2026, at the same time and place.

data.title: Trump predicts largest tax refund season in 2026 due to 'One Big Beautiful Bill Act', with refunds potentially rising by $1,000 per filer. Stabilizing economy until 2030.
data.description: President Trump claimed that Americans will experience the "largest tax refund season ever," thanks to his administration's legislative reforms. He highlighted the success of the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," which consolidated 17 initiatives into one comprehensive package. This bill is predicted to bring an average refund increase of up to $1,000 per filer, with retroactive provisions like "No Tax on Tips" and "No Tax on Overtime." The White House and groups like the Tax Foundation project this refund surge, fueled by tariffs revenue. Trump believes this legislation will stabilize the economy for the rest of the decade.

data.title: Dow futures drop amid AI concerns and CPI inflation. Arista, Applied Materials shine in earnings. Market disruption fears rise.
data.description: Stock market futures experienced a decline following the release of the Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation data. Applied Materials and Arista saw increases in their stock prices following their earnings reports. Concerns over potential disruption caused by artificial intelligence (AI) are impacting various sectors of the stock market. The Dow Jones futures were affected by these fears and the impending CPI inflation release. The market is currently being influenced by these factors.

data.title: Alithya's Q3 Fiscal 2026: $115.2M revenues, $0.7M net earnings, $10M Adjusted EBITDA, $130.9M Bookings. Maintaining focus on transformation projects.
data.description: Alithya Group Inc. reported its Q3-2026 Highlights with revenues decreasing slightly to $115.2 million, Gross Margin at $36.5 million, Net earnings increasing to $0.7 million, and Adjusted EBITDA at $10.0 million, all compared to the same quarter last year. Despite lower revenues, the company had a strong cash position, with net cash from operating activities amounting to $25.5 million, indicating an increase. Q3 Bookings were $130.9 million, leading to a Book-to-Bill Ratio of 1.14. The company also announced plans to spin off equity interests related to Datum Consulting Group to enhance investments in AI solutions. Alithya's strategic shift focuses on specialized transformation projects to leverage AI-driven technologies.

data.title: Crypto investment institutions invest US$60M in Jiuzi Holdings, boosting original amount by 50%. Jiuzi's DAT strategy moves to implementation phase.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. revealed they had finalized a Securities Purchase Agreement (SPA) with various strategic investment institutions prominent in crypto treasury management and digital asset allocation. As part of this agreement, these investors agreed to purchase 40,000,000 ordinary shares of the company at $1.50 each, totaling about $60 million. The investment will be made using equivalent crypto assets. This significant transaction was made public on February 12, 2026.

data.title: Orrön Energy receives MEUR 1.6 from portfolio transaction closing for solar projects. Milestone reached from December 2025 announcement.
data.description: Orrön Energy AB, Orrön Energy, has successfully completed the closing for a solar project as part of a portfolio deal revealed in December 2025. This achievement marks a significant milestone, leading to payments totaling 1.6 million Euros (MEUR 1.6).
